sentence_reviews.text: Policies are optimized directly, often with a learned value or critic to reduce variance and guide improvement.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sutton & Barto RL book, policy-gradient and actor-critic method chapters, including value-function baselines/critics.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
